name: Iran
summary: Day 67 Tuesday. KINETIC RESTART MAY 4 — TRUMP REJECTED 14-POINT PROPOSAL AS 'NOT ACCEPTABLE'; IRAN RESPONDED SAME DAY WITH MULTI-AXIS ATTACKS: cruise missiles + drones + small boats at US Navy + commercial vessels in Hormuz; 4 cruise missiles + drone strike at UAE Fujairah Oil Industry Zone (3 Indian nationals injured); explosion+fire on SK-flagged HMM Namu cargo ship in Hormuz. US helicopters (Apache+Seahawk) sank 6 small Iranian boats (Trump said 7); 2 US destroyers transited Hormuz under 'Project Freedom'. The May 1-3 diplomatic-window thesis is decisively contested. State media REVERSE-CYCLED: IRNA dismissed Project Freedom as 'delirium'; Tasnim threatened UAE ('all of its interests will become Iran's target'); IRGC claimed prevented US warship entry. US response to 14-point conveyed back via Pakistan, under Iranian review (procedural fig leaf). Apr 8 US-Iran ceasefire effectively broken. Markets adjudicated: Brent +5.80% to $114.44 May 4 (-0.8% Tue intraday giveback to $113.48); VIX +7.7% to 18.29; USD/INR fresh record ₹95.34 (+0.5% Tue, Day 2 sustained); S&P -0.41% to 7,200.75 off record close; Apple flat $280.14; KOSPI +5.1% record 6,936.99 (DECOUPLED on AI cycle). Rial decelerated to 1.818M IRR/USD (+0.28% 1D — flat 4 sessions; hyperinflation 2M trigger window extends despite kinetic restart). Mojtaba Day 58 absence; refutation window EXPIRED. Branches: kinetic ~40-45% (UP), extended-economic-warfare ~40%, negotiated-resolution ~15-20% (DOWN from 25%).
